languages.text: "Как видите". {n}Куравич обводит рукой истерзанное поселение.{/n} "Раньше было тяжко, но хоть ксеносы не резали. Вы не обижайтесь, но все знают, что мы руины эти разворошили, как гнездо плотоядных мух, по вашему приказу. Спасибо хоть, в беде не бросили".

traits.locale_text: "Как видите". {n}Куравич обводит рукой истерзанное поселение. {/n}"Раньше было тяжко, но хоть ксеносы не резали. Вы не обижайтесь, но все знают, что мы руины эти разворошили, как гнездо плотоядных мух, по вашему приказу. Спасибо хоть, в беде не бросили".

languages.text: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."
languages.original_text: "Как видите". {n}Куравич обводит рукой истерзанное поселение.{/n} "Раньше было тяжко, но хоть ксеносы не резали. Вы не обижайтесь, но все знают, что мы руины эти разворошили, как гнездо плотоядных мух, по вашему приказу. Спасибо хоть, в беде не бросили".

traits.locale_text: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

"As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the mangled settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offense, but everyone knows we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies on your orders. I suppose I should thank you for not leaving us in the lurch at least."

"As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

"As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not bailing out on us, at least."

"As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

"As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

"As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

languages.text: “如您所见。”{n}库拉维奇挥手指向那片被毁的定居点。{/n}“以前日子也苦，可至少没被异形屠杀。说句不中听的，但谁都知道，是您下令让我们去招惹那片遗迹的，结果像捅了食肉蝇的窝一样。不过至少您没丢下我们跑路，对此我还是十分感激。”
languages.original_text: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

traits.locale_text: “如您所见。”{n}库拉维奇挥手指向那片被毁的定居点。{/n}“以前日子也苦，可至少没被异形屠杀。说句不中听的，但谁都知道，是您下令让我们去招惹那片遗迹的，结果像捅了食肉蝇的窝一样。不过至少您没丢下我们跑路，对此我还是十分感激。”

languages.text: "Gördüğünüz gibi." {n}Kuravich, eliyle harap olmuş yerleşimi işaret ediyor.{/n} "Daha önce de hayat zordu ama en azından zenolar bizi katletmiyordu. Kusura bakmayın ama bu harabeleri et yiyen sinek yuvası gibi karıştırmamızın sizin emrinizle olduğu herkesçe biliniyor. Sanırım en azından bizi terk etmediğiniz için size teşekkür etmeliyim."
languages.original_text: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

traits.locale_text: "Gördüğünüz gibi." {n}Kuravich, eliyle harap olmuş yerleşimi işaret ediyor.{/n} "Daha önce de hayat zordu ama en azından zenolar bizi katletmiyordu. Kusura bakmayın ama bu harabeleri et yiyen sinek yuvası gibi karıştırmamızın sizin emrinizle olduğu herkesçe biliniyor. Sanırım en azından bizi terk etmediğiniz için size teşekkür etmeliyim."

languages.text: « Voyez vous-même, {n}répond Kuravich en montrant la colonie dévastée.{/n} La vie n'était pas rose avant, mais au moins, on ne se faisait pas massacrer par des xénos. Sans vouloir vous vexer, tout le monde sait que c'est vous qui nous avez donné l'ordre de fouiller ces ruines comme une nuée de mouches carnivores. Enfin, je suppose que je peux vous remercier de ne pas nous avoir abandonnés. »
languages.original_text: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

traits.locale_text: « Voyez vous-même, {n}répond Kuravich en montrant la colonie dévastée.{/n} La vie n'était pas rose avant, mais au moins, on ne se faisait pas massacrer par des xénos. Sans vouloir vous vexer, tout le monde sait que c'est vous qui nous avez donné l'ordre de fouiller ces ruines comme une nuée de mouches carnivores. Enfin, je suppose que je peux vous remercier de ne pas nous avoir abandonnés. »

languages.text: «Puede usted verlo con sus propios ojos». {n}Kuravich gesticula en dirección al asentamiento arrasado.{/n} «La vida ya era dura antes, pero por lo menos los xenos no nos atacaban. No se ofenda, pero todos sabemos que fue por orden suya que hicimos despertar estas ruinas cual nido de moscas carnívoras. Supongo que debo agradecerle que no nos haya abandonado, por lo menos».
languages.original_text: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

traits.locale_text: «Puede usted verlo con sus propios ojos». {n}Kuravich gesticula en dirección al asentamiento arrasado.{/n} «La vida ya era dura antes, pero por lo menos los xenos no nos atacaban. No se ofenda, pero todos sabemos que fue por orden suya que hicimos despertar estas ruinas cual nido de moscas carnívoras. Supongo que debo agradecerle que no nos haya abandonado, por lo menos».

languages.text: "Seht selbst." {n}Kuravich deutet mit einer Hand auf die verwüstete Siedlung.{/n} "Hart war das Leben hier schon immer, aber wenigstens wurden wir nicht von Xenos abgeschlachtet. Nichts für ungut, aber alle wissen, dass wir diese Ruinen auf Euren Befehl aufgescheucht haben wie ein Nest Fleisch fressender Fliegen. Vermutlich sollte ich Euch danken, dass Ihr uns wenigstens nicht im Stich gelassen habt."
languages.original_text: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."

traits.locale_text: "Seht selbst." {n}Kuravich deutet mit einer Hand auf die verwüstete Siedlung.{/n} "Hart war das Leben hier schon immer, aber wenigstens wurden wir nicht von Xenos abgeschlachtet. Nichts für ungut, aber alle wissen, dass wir diese Ruinen auf Euren Befehl aufgescheucht haben wie ein Nest Fleisch fressender Fliegen. Vermutlich sollte ich Euch danken, dass Ihr uns wenigstens nicht im Stich gelassen habt."

languages.text: 「ご覧の通りです」{n}クラヴィッチは荒廃した集落を片手で掃き、言った。{/n}「以前は生活は厳しかったが、少なくとも異種族は我々を虐殺していなかった。失礼だが、この肉食の虫の巣のような廃墟を我々が掻き立てたのは、君の命令によるものだと皆知っている。少なくとも、我々を捨てなかったことに感謝するべきだろう。」
languages.original_text: "As you see." {n}Kuravich sweeps a hand over the devastated settlement.{/n} "Life was hard before, but at least the xenos weren't butchering us. No offence, but everyone knows it was on your orders that we stirred up these ruins like a nest of flesh-eating flies. I suppose I should thank you for not abandoning us, at least."
